violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026

Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as prepared sauces) in the 2-door reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. Various food items were observed stored over ice during time on inspection. Sufficient refrigeration is required. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in behind the service counter. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2026

The dishwasher located in the kitchen area was observed leaking water from intake and the sanitizer line and is not in good repair. Per PIC, call to service has been placed to repair sanitizer line and will add water leak to repair request. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026

The ceiling in the kitchen area was observed to be missing a portion of the ceiling material and is in poor repair. Per PIC, a leak was discovered during snowstorm and is waiting on landlord to repair ceiling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Paper were also not available at the kitchen hand sink by the dishwasher and the hand sink before the breakfast counter. Both soap and paper towels were provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

Raw animal foods (bacon) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (loaves of bread and muffins) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. The raw bacon was moved to a lower location below any RTE food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. Various food items were observed stored over ice during time on inspection. Sufficient refrigeration is required. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

Smoked salmon was observed in the kitchen 2-door reach-in with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). ROP seafood shall be removed from packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Salmon was observed at 38 degrees Fahrenheit and was removed from packaging during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler and the 1-door reach-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
